title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 107.060 - Bond — cost paid by county (first class counties)
text:
107.060.  Bond — cost paid by county (first class counties). — In all counties of class one, as provided by law, the officers thereof shall be required to furnish a bond as required by law, the cost thereof to be paid by the county.
(RSMo 1939 § 13535, A.L. 1945 p. 1576 § 2)
